location_name: Baptist Health Emergency Care | Country Walk (West Kendall)

reviews.review_text: Dr. Very nice and all the staff today
The best ones ❤️
Thank you for the care you provide!!
The series excellent
Very clean. Good place to go. My husband was treated professionally. We did not spend a lot of time. I am very satisfied. Thanks
I went in with an upper respiratory infection and wanted to make sure I didn’t have pneumonia. Staff and service was excellent and quick. I highly recommend this facility to everyone.

Omggg these people are so amazing very good work, they make sure they patients are comfortable & make sure they are well taking care of this the first hospital I ever been to that’s this great keep up the good work guys yall are very amazing.these people really need a reward ! I definitely love you guys there I’ll always come here ! Everyone please attend this hospital

The service they provide from the  frontdesk until the last person who  gives you the discharge is amazing. Best location ever, very clean, nurses are great and the doctor who treat me was the best. Thank you
I was in such pain when I arrived. I was seen within 5 minutes. The team members were so caring. I am doing so much better. Thank you
Came to this ER and everyone was very nice and professional. Help was at your side right away when you press the nurse button for assistance. Thank you everyone.

Excellent service! Both Nurse Damaris and Dr. Mendez were incredibly kind, providing exceptional care; you feel looked after with great professionalism and genuine warmth. We always leave this hospital with the best experience! They are the best—you can sense the professionalism the moment you arrive!
The service is top-notch.
reviews.original_review_text: La atención es de primera

reviews.review_text: Gone to baptist urgent care locations and was greatly disappointed. This emergency room staff was great. Very knowledgeable. Been here a few times and the care is outstanding.
Good
reviews.original_review_text: Buena

reviews.review_text: Best nurses and Doctors. I highly recommend this ER.  Thank you for taking good care of me.
Ashley Giraldo and Ariadny provided extremely professional service; it's great to know they have highly qualified and very courteous staff. Congratulations!
reviews.original_review_text: Atención sumamente profesional de Ashley Giraldo y Ariadny, agradable saber que cuentan con personal altamente calificado y muy corteses, felicitaciones

reviews.review_text: Lauren and Luisa were really good and Manuel were very helpful and explained everything in detail
Excellent and really professional attention it was fast and convenient I will recommend
They are so efficient! Everyone was super attentive and professional and I was not there for hours on end. I highly recommend.
Staff excellent nurses ultrasound tech and Dr very pleasant and compassionate would highly recommend this facility
Super great experience. Left feeling way better.
Excellent
Great experience. Staff did their jobs with care and professionalism. Very satisfied.
From the receptionist, nurses tech and doctor  everyone was  caring, respectful, attentive to my needs and privacy. The care was superb. Thank you to all!
Fast and friendly service, dedicated team and quality attention. I recommend 100%

I appreciate you all so much! Super quick checkin process, the best care from all medical staff (shoutout to my RN Letty 💙), and I left feeling better and with a treatment plan. I can't thank you all enough!
Everyone there is was absolutely amazing!! Very kind and very professional!! You guys are the best !!

It was truly a pleasant experience going to Baptist Urgent Care today. The employees are pleasant and respectful. Amazingly, also,  the service was fast. Immediately after I was checked in at the front desk, I was called by a technician. Minutes after he escorted me
to a room, the doctor arrived.
The nurses provided excellent care and the doctor was very kind 👍
reviews.original_review_text: Muy buena atención las enfermeras y la doctora muy amable 👍

reviews.review_text: It was the best decision of the day. The service and attention are unbeatable. The whole team is very professional, and there are no delays in getting the tests ordered by the doctor. Thank you so much!
reviews.original_review_text:
Fue la mejor decisión de ese día El trato y la atencion son inmejorables. Todo el equipo es muy profesional Y no hay demoras para realizar los exámenes ordenados por el doctor
Gracias Gracias mil

reviews.review_text:
This was my first experience at the 24 hour urgent care.  The team worked so well together to assess my condition.  My nurse, Miguel was so attentive and concerned for my comfort and relief from symptoms.  All the staff were very professional and thorough in assessment of my symptoms. They made a difficult set of symptoms much more comfortable.  They get an A+ from me!

05/27/26
UPDATE:  This was my second visit to this facility.  Again, the experience was outstanding.Dr. Ann Giovanni was an amazing doctor.  She listened to all questions and answered them thoroughly.  She was pleasant and professional.

The service was generally good, quick, and friendly, but I have a complaint. They drew blood from my son without a referral. The four blood collection tubes were left on the table in the room, and when I complained, they just said they drew the blood to get ahead because they thought the doctor was going to send the referral. I don't think it's right to draw blood for no reason.
reviews.original_review_text: La atención en general fue buena en atención rápida y amable, pero tengo una queja. A mi hijo le sacaron sangre sin haber tenido una orden para sacar sangre, los cuatro tubos de sangre se quedaron sobre la mesa del cuarto y cuando me quejé solo dijeron que le sacaron la sangre para adelantar porque pensaban que la doctora iba a mandar la orden y eso no me parece, que saquen sangre por gusto

reviews.review_text: Excellent, I was treated right away and extremely professional personnel very knowledgeable right on point. I walked out feeling better.
I’m happy with the level of care that I have received at WKB emergency room
Excellent attention and prompt and professional service.
Excellent in everything !
The care was exceptional.  Everyone was attentive. Polite.

From the moment I entered the facility, the staff was courteous, attentive and efficient. Dr. Yarde, after learning that I didn’t fall or injure my thumb, guessed that my very red, swollen and PAINFUL thumb was probably due to arthritis. X-rays confirmed her suspicions. She ordered two injections that began to help within 20 minutes! She sent me home with two prescriptions. Thank you
I really like the service I receive here, professional team
reviews.original_review_text: Me gusta mucho atenderme aqui, equipo professional

reviews.review_text: The service was good, fast, and very professional. They did many tests. I don't understand why they didn't prescribe an anti-inflammatory, and for the pain, they only gave me 600 mg of ibuprofen. I expected better medication while I wait for my appointment with the specialist. Thank you.
reviews.original_review_text: El trato fue bueno rapido muy profesional hicieron muchos exámenes no entiendo porque no me mandaron un antiinflamatorio y para el dolor solamente ibuprofen 600 mg  esperaba mejor medicamento en lo que espero el turno del especialista gracias

reviews.review_text: Very attentive staff and prompt care. Dr Hwang and Dr Arcasia exhibited expertise in their practice! Evaleen, my nurse, walked me through the whole process and that gave me such security to know that i am around people i can trust with my care. Jose T, their charge nurse, visited me to make sure i am well taken care of and their manager Enit called me the day after to make sure I am doing better. It was an overall great experience from when i walked in to exiting their facility.
Good service, fast, efficient, high quality. Thank you.
reviews.original_review_text: Buena atención, rápido, eficiente dé alta calidad Gracias.

reviews.review_text: Extremely satisfied. The staff was kind, courteous and extremely knowledgeable and professional. This is the 2nd time that I visited this Emergency Urgent Care center and they were awesome. They deserve 10 stars.

Yesterday I spent the entire afternoon and evening in the emergency room. I received excellent care; I was seen promptly, had tests and a quick check-up, and was treated very kindly by the doctors and nurses.
reviews.original_review_text: Ayer pase toda la tarde y noche en emergencia, me lleve la mejor atencion ,me atendieron con prontitud,  me hicieron análisis y chequeo rapido , los médicos y enfermeros me atendieron con mucha amabilidad.

reviews.review_text: My nurse was so attentive and understanding to my needs.
Exelent service the emplyees very helpfull and polite
Daniel, Dr. Alvarez, Steph, Ralph were all very Patient oriented.  They were able to get rid of my discomfort and I left without any issues.
Everyone was very friendly and professional.  All my questions were answered and I was treated promptly
I really liked how I was treated by the staff.
It was a good experience under the circumstances. I would definitely recommend this hospital to my family and friends.
Staff was extremely professional and friendly. Their attitude allowed me to feel comfortable during my stay.
The experience was amazing, from the moment we walked in until I was discharged.. Dr Hwang was thorough and friendly and put my mind at ease. Thank you Dr Hwang
Excellent service
Very good
Very clean, neat and very nice employees.  Very easy and fast even to get medications

I was truly impressed with the care we received at this emergency hospital. From the moment we arrived, everyone was kind, professional, and attentive. I especially want to recognize the nurse, I believe her name was Marilyn, who cared for my child — she was incredibly sweet, compassionate, and reassuring during a stressful moment. Her kindness made a huge difference for our family. We are very grateful for the excellent care and service.

Everyone was wonderful. Very attentive. And quickly helped me with my pain from
Registration , to nurses to arnp and transport. Everyone treated me with respect.
This time it was very quick.
I'm still having the same problem with difficulty breathing. Anyway, thank you for your help, and happy Mother's Day to all the moms who were helping me.
reviews.original_review_text: Sigo con El mismo problema de respirar con dificultad,, igual gracias por atenderme y un feliz dia alas mamas que en ese momento me atendieron

reviews.review_text: Always very clean, very professional and quick to get in, get helped and get sent home with meds in hand. Thank you Baptist
I have no complaints; I received excellent care. And best of all, it was quick. Both the doctor and the nurses were very kind.
reviews.original_review_text: No tengo quejas me atendieron muy bien. Y lo mejor que rápido . Y tanto el doctor como las enfermeras muy amables

reviews.review_text: Not happy at all went because my dog bit me they didn’t clean the wound didn’t give me the prescription for the antibiotic’s! A few questions and that is it . If I would of known I would of stage home very poor service since at the end of the day wether it was something urgent or not I still have to pay - I would not go again rather Waite the next day for the urgent care center or go to the actual hospital.
Very professional
Amazing service, very professional and caring. Also super fast. Definitely recommend.

I had a really positive experience at this hospital while my friend was being treated after a serious ATV accident and concussion. The staff acted with urgency right away, which made a stressful situation feel a lot more under control.

Nurse Nick was nice and good comedic relief, Nurse Marilyn was incredibly kind, patient, and gentle while helping my friend get situated, especially since she was in a lot of pain. She made sure my friend was as comfortable as possible and handled everything with care.

She also went out of her way to check on me, which I really appreciated. She even brought me cranberry juice without me asking twice, which meant a lot in that moment. Also a special thanks to Nurse Practitioner Katherina she tried to make sure she got every detail on the situation.

Overall, the hospital environment felt attentive, efficient, and compassionate. I’m really grateful for the level of care my friend received.
It was fast the people there did everything to make me feel cared for it was how it should be
Very Nice doctor and nurse attention about the patient.

It was great! The NP Gustavo Díaz and my nurse Rafael were great. The NP took his time to ask me what was wrong and explained to me what they were going to do . I explained that I have psoriatic arthritis flareups to look at my chart to see what they give me that works but I also had a pain on my left shoulder and arm. Even though the ER was fully packed, everybody took their time. The NURSE Ralph was checking up on me and taking care of me. Even the tech being short stuff down to text she was very nice and took care of everything without rushing
efficient service best hospital freindly doctors
Excellent service and I was seen within 5 minutes.

Great service. Thank you so much for all the attention received from the staff from the front desk to the room #13. Dr Ann Giovanni, Rn Ms Marilyn, Lauren, ,Thank you so much it really made me feel better and it was beyond my expectations.
Everything was impeccable and all of you were just amazing 😻 Blessings to all and again thank you for your service, dedication and your commitment.
Very good service and comunicación about my medical situation.
Very attentive

Excellent and quick admission process. The nursing team and doctor are very efficient in their profession and in their treatment of patients. I am very satisfied and recommend it as the best Emergency Center.
reviews.original_review_text: Magnifica y rapida admision,el tean de enfermeros y Doctora,muy eficiente en su profesion y trato con  los enfermos .Estoy muy satisfecha y lo recomiendo,como el mejor Centro de Emergencias6

reviews.review_text: I arrived at the emergency care feeling intense ear pain, but thankfully there was no waiting line. The staff managed to take care of me quickly, and I left feeling much better. The doctors and nurses did a wonderful job.

I always choose Baptist Country Walk Emergency Room. I’ve never had to wait more than 10 mins and the staff is so nice! Very accommodating and helpful. They wouldn’t let me walk with a pulled muscle. They always offered a wheelchair. Extremely satisfied with their service and level of care
Excellent staff, service and facility. They took very good care of me. Kudos to Dr. Hart and her team for making my 1st visit a very memorable one. Will definitely come back if needed.
I appreciate the excellent care I received from the moment I arrived until I left the facility. The doctors, nurses, and technicians all treated me very professionally. Thank you all so much.
reviews.original_review_text: Agradezco la magnífica atención desde mi entrada asta que salí de la instalación... los médicos enfermeros técnicos todos me atendieron muy profesional.. muchas gracias a todos

reviews.review_text: Excellent service
On Friday I took my mom to the emergency room. As always, the service was exceptional, with efficient wait times and quick test results. We are very grateful.
reviews.original_review_text: El viernes llevé a mi mamá a la emergencia, como siempre el trato fue excepcional, eficiencia en el tiempo de espera y del resultado de estudios. Estamos muy agradecidas.

reviews.review_text: Excellent work by the entire medical team
reviews.original_review_text: Un excelente trabajo de todo el equipo medico

reviews.review_text: Everyone was kind and patient with my baby, and they explained everything clearly to us. We barely had to wait to be helped. Thanks!
Dr, nurses and techs were caring and empathetic
I could not have received better care. The professional service was like none other Ive received elsewhere. Thank You to the team that treated me!!!!

Amazing ER! The staff is excellent.
Facility is always neat & clean. Best ER in S.Florida.
Fast and  every one was very caring

I was treated in the emergency department where I received excellent treatment from the medical and nursing staff. From my arrival, they attended me with speed, kindness and professionalism. They did the necessary studies, explained my condition clearly and answered all my questions. During all the attention I felt well taken care of and respected. Overall, the experience was very good and  satisfying.
Excellent service from all the staff; they were friendly, professional, and above all, they helped me resolve the health problem I had.
reviews.original_review_text:
Muy buen servicio de todo el personal,fueron amables , profesionales y sobre todo me
Ayudaron a resolver el problema de
Salud con el que fui .

reviews.review_text: The people who work at that center are very kind and helpful; the service was excellent.
reviews.original_review_text: Las personas que laboran en ese centro son muy amables y serviciales el trato fue excelente

reviews.review_text: Thank god they open this place up !! The services was amazing I loved the doctors here !!
Excellent place was in and out in an hour. Highly recommend this ER! A 10!👍🏻🤗

Dr. Giovanni, Bryan and the techs. were great. The whole experience couldn't be better, I was taken care of promptly and efficiently. Dr. Giovanni gave me a great check up to ascertain what was giving me such a sharp abdominal pain, she as well as nurse Bryan explained everything thoroughly and gave me their full time and attention. They made a great team, and I am very grateful for their care.

Dr. Giovanni and her staff were wonderful! Very friendly, courteous and I received my results of CT Scan and bloodwork in a timely manner. This was my first visit to ER by Tamiami airport  and it was a pleasant experience.
Excellent service, cleanliness, friendly and compassionate staff. I highly recommend it. The doctor who treated me was wonderful and professional.
reviews.original_review_text: Buenas atención, limpieza, personal amable y con humanidad lo recomiendo por completo y la doctora que me atendió maravillosa y profesional.

reviews.review_text: Quick and very efficient service, thank you all
reviews.original_review_text: Atención rápida y muy eficiente, gracias a todos

reviews.review_text: On April 19, my son was attended by Nurse Bryan, and he was very special, clear, and highly professional in his care. His warmth was an added bonus for us.
Excellent service, my first time there and I wouldn't hesitate to return if my health required it.
reviews.original_review_text: Magnifica atención,primera vez en el lugar y no dudaría regresar si mi salud lo requisiera

reviews.review_text: Great professional services, promptly in each process and caring. Highly appreciated and would recommend.
Service and the attention was outstanding.
Wonderful nurses, support staff and doctors! Took very good care of me and diagnosed my symptoms! Feeling much better since! Thank you all!
Spectacular service from the moment the center opens its doors, very committed to their work
reviews.original_review_text: Atencion expectacular desde q se abren las puertas del centro,muy comprometidos con su trabajo

reviews.review_text:
The staff were very helpful.
Dr Menon explained everything very well
Professional, caring, quick turnaround and minimal waiting time

Excellent service. The wait to be seen was minimal. The staff was very professional. Bilingual service is a plus. The hygiene was impeccable. And the best part was that my pain disappeared immediately after I applied the medication prescribed by the doctor. Thank you—please maintain these service standards.
Best Health treatment, fast and efficient,

I had a great experience at Baptist Health Emergency at Country Walk. I went in for flu-like symptoms and a sore throat, and from the moment I arrived, the care was excellent.

Vanessa Perdomo, PA, was incredibly caring and attentive. She took the time to thoroughly evaluate me and made sure I received the proper medications—some of which were even administered there, helping me start feeling better right away.

The entire team was wonderful. Nurse Elmer was very kind and attentive, and Daniel, the ED tech, placed my IV so gently and was extremely friendly throughout the process.

This isn’t my first visit—I’ve also brought my kids here several times—and every experience has been consistently positive. It’s definitely a place I trust and highly recommend.
It was a magnificent experience, everyone was very attentive and professional, I felt very well taken care of.
reviews.original_review_text: Fue una experiencia magnífica, todos muy atentos y profesionales, me sentí muy bien atendida.

reviews.review_text: I want to express my heartfelt gratitude for the remarkable care I received at the ER. The nurses were wonderful, and I want to especially thank Nurse Letty for her kindness, compassion, and empathy during such a stressful time. Dr. Tarde was also incredibly kind, attentive, and understanding. Their professionalism and genuine care made all the difference. Thank you all for treating me with such warmth and respect.
Excellent in everyway, its refreshing to see that nowadays!
Doctor Tyson,the nurses and the X-ray tech were attentive, amazing,kind and professional at all times. Thank you 😊
Great staff and service

From the minute I arrived, the level of care and attention was enormous. They helped me with compassion which for me is the most essential part of service. At all levels from triage through exams and tests provided.
Thank you for your service and expertise.
Sincerely,
Adriana Graves

Everyone was very professional and explained everything making sure I was comfortable in all the pain I was in. The doctor took his time in explaining and answering what ever questions my husband and I had. The service and wait time was good.

The behavior of one of the nurses was appalling. We arrived on Wednesday, April 8th, with my daughter, who had knee pain. The nurse who was attending to us was very serious from the start and treated us very curtly. In contrast, the doctor, who was very kind, ordered an X-ray for our daughter. However, he was taking a long time to come and see us, and my daughter was desperate because she was hungry; it was around 8 pm. My husband politely approached the nurse and asked for the doctor, and he rudely replied that we had to wait because there was only one doctor for everyone. My husband explained that he knew this, but that our daughter was hungry and just wanted to know, and the nurse continued to respond rudely. When the doctor finally arrived, he was explaining things to us in English and asked the nurse to translate. The nurse only repeated what he wanted to hear from the doctor, and he was equally rude. The doctor told us we just had to wait for the paperwork. Quite some time passed, and the nurse still hadn't brought us the paperwork. He was attending to a patient across from our bed. When he finished, my husband went back to him to ask if he would be much longer, explaining that our daughter hadn't eaten in a long time and was hungry. This young nurse raised his voice in a way that left us stunned. 😲 He was incredibly rude. My husband said, "I only asked you two questions, but what is this?" We were about to leave, and my daughter was extremely nervous, almost crying, seeing her father in that situation.

Then he said, "But aren't you going to wait for the paperwork?" My husband replied, "If you give it to me now, okay?" And then, in front of other nurses and hospital staff, he accused my husband of preventing him from working by asking questions in front of the patients. This was completely untrue. My husband had been waiting until he was alone. It was truly an embarrassing situation for someone who is supposed to have empathy and compassion for others, especially in front of a child. It was very, very sad.
reviews.original_review_text:
Muy mal el comportamiento de uno de sus enfermeros, llegamos el miércoles día 8 de abril con mi hija con un dolor de rodillas. El enfermero que nos estaba atendiendo estuvo muy serio desde el primer momento nos trató muy cortante. Al contrario del médico muy amable le mandó hacer una placa a la niña. Pero él se demoraba después en venir a vernos y mi niña estaba desesperada porque ya tenía hambre eran alrededor de las 8 pm, mi esposo  muy amablemente se acerca al enfermero y le pregunta por el doctor y él da una respuesta en muy mala forma que teníamos que esperar porque era un solo doctor para todos mi esposo le explica que él lo sabe pero que la niña estaba con hambre que sólo quería saber y el con una muy mala actitud sigue respondiendo. Cuando el doctor vino nos estaba explicando en inglés y le pide al enfermero que traduzca y el de todo lo que decía el doctor sólo dijo lo que quiso e igual hablando con mala forma. El doctor nos dijo que solo teníamos que esperar los papeles. Pasó bastante tiempo y el enfermero no nos traía los papeles. Estaba atendiendo a un paciente de al frente de la cama de nosotros, cuando terminó mi esposo se le vuelve acercar a decirle que por favor que si faltaba mucho que la niña no había comido nada hacía ya mucho tiempo y tenía hambre. Ese muchacho el enfermero le Alzó la voz de una manera que nos quedamos atónito 😲. Y con muy muy mala actitud. Mi esposo le dijo solo te he echo dos preguntas pero que es esto. Ahí ya nos íbamos a ir mi niña súper nerviosa casi al llorar por ver a su papá en esa situación.
Ahí él nos dijo pero no van a esperar los papeles y mi esposo le dijo si me los das ahora ok. Y él diciéndole delante de más enfermeros y personal del hospital que mi esposo no lo dejaba trabajar preguntándole cosas delante de los pacientes. Cosas que jamás fue así . Pque mi esposo esperaba a que él estuviera solo. De verdad que una situación muy vergonzosa para una persona que se supone que debe tener empatía y solidaridad por los demás. Delante de una niña y todo. Muy muy triste.

reviews.review_text: A wonderful experience, accompanied by empathy, kindness and professionalism; we are extremely grateful for their care.
reviews.original_review_text: Una experiencia maravillosa, acompañada de empatía, amabilidad y profesionalismo, sumamente agradecidos de sus cuidados.

reviews.review_text: Best care I received in a long time

I went in late at night to go get my foot checked because I was in pain and a few days later I am still in a lot of pain. They checked me doctor came in asked question didn’t even touch my foot she just diagnosed me on the spot and just drink Tylenol oh and I know they didn’t read my file that I have high blood pressure and they were giving me ibuprofen. Didn’t like their service.

Fast service. Showed excellent concern about the patient's well-being . Staff was able to answer all questions and concerns about my pre-existing health\n And was able to accommodate. Experience. staff, excellent service.
They are the best ER in the area. Staff is always friendly and attentive. Great experience. Would highly recommend. The doctors and nurses all deserve recognition.

I am so happy that I decided to go to this ER.The service, the attention was amazing Vanessa Perdomo you were 100% top of the line .The nurse was incredible Leticia,  she was dynamite.
Everybody was truly professional.
Dr. Giovanni  was incredibly kind and attentive. She listened carefully, answered all my questions, and made me feel at ease throughout my ER visit. .
Great experience with the staff narcissist and the doctor. Took very well care of my mom while she was there.
Fast , caring and knowledgeable
Very good service. Waiting time five minutes, super clean facility, and came back home with issue solved.
Best Emergency Care ever, loved the staff and everything, super fast and the place is very clean.
Excellent service from all the staff
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atención por parte de todo el personal

reviews.review_text: Great attention. Good service and I am very thankful for the service of Leticia   She is compassionate and made me feel good at all the time

I had a great experience at Baptist Health Emergency Care (Country Walk). The entire staff was professional, attentive, and truly took the time to understand my concerns. From the moment I arrived, I felt cared for and respected. The team worked efficiently while still being compassionate, which made a stressful situation much easier to handle. I’m very grateful for the excellent care I received and would highly recommend them to anyone in need of emergency services.
I want to personally thank Bari Conte. She was my doctor and was simply amazing. Made sure to order all my necessary tests and kept me and my family informed. Excellent care! Thank you Bari
Very good, fast and professional. I really liked their service. Thank you.
reviews.original_review_text: Muy buena ,rápida y profesional me gusto mucho su atención .gracias

reviews.review_text: Awesome team! Great and fast service.
Everything was very good, the treatment of the doctor and the nursing staff, everything very clean, thank you
reviews.original_review_text: Todo fue muy bien,el trato de la dra y el personal de enfermería,todo muy limpio, gracias

reviews.review_text: I Was treated with kindness,  respect, and patience . It is always stressful to enter an emergency room, and I was extremely grateful to the  entire staff for making me feel comfortable, calm and well cared for.
Excellent

Incredible experience. I came late night feeling so sick. They helped me quickly and the nurses were lovely, especially Marilyn who put a smile on my face despite feeling like death 🤣 Since I recently moved to this area it feels good to have a hospital close by that takes great care of the patients.

Excellent service. And customer service
Thank you
Excellent attention, professional persons
Was a nice experience!
reviews.profile_name: Carmen Dolores Del Moral de Larrazabal

reviews.review_text: Manuel did an excellent job taking care of my ear. Thank you!!

GREAT CARE!! AMAZING DOCTORS AND NURSES, THE ENTIRE STAFF GOES ABOVE AND BEYIND FOR YOU!! RECOMMEND 100000%.  ALSO IF YOUR SUTUATION IS CRITICAL THEY SEND YOU TO A HOSPITAL RIGHT AWAY!!! IN OTHER WORDS 5 STARS WISH I WISH I COULD GIVE IT 10!!!

Dr. Chacón treated me incredibly well; her work was super professional. The service was incredibly efficient, and the reception staff treated me well and quickly. Honestly, 100 points! Thank you, and blessings to all.
reviews.original_review_text: La doctora Chacón  me trató increíble un trabajo súper profesional la atención fue súper eficiente los de recepción me trataron bien  y rápido la verdad 100puntos gracias bendiciones para todos

reviews.review_text: They attended me on the spot, they treated my wound immediately and the PA and the nurse were amazing, the same with the gentleman that received right after I enter the center. Great service!!! Thanks to all!!
Excellent service ! Everyone so nice ; Doctor, nurses , Technicians , front desk . Fast and great service.

I was very pleased with how gracious and attentive everyone was. The entire team was very knowledgeable at what they do.
Although it was unfortunate that I was there
I can honestly say I felt that I was in good hands. I highly recommend them.
My stay at Baptist ER was as good as it could possibly be considering how sick I felt. Nurse Eveline took very good care of me. She was awesome!
Service  Excellent !!
It it’s a great hospital. Everyone is super nice and efficient. From the reception to the Dr.s
Excellent all Staff Front Desk, Guard ❤️ Dra and RN. My Baptist Family 🥰😘Thank you!
Excellent service, very professional.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atención muy profesionales.

reviews.review_text: Friendly, very attentive, in and out in a jiffy.  Staff extremely professional.  I was a patient a few weeks earlier for a cough, when I returned last night they remembered me so we kind of picked up where we left off.  I love that little medicine dispenser unit
Superb, the best, spectacular service
reviews.original_review_text: Súper lo mejor un trato espectacular

reviews.review_text: Excellent service from all the medical staff. Thank you! They are wonderful, warm, and professional.

Excelente servicio de todo el personal médico.. Gracias

reviews.review_text: Excellent medical care, thank you so much to the dedicated nurses and doctors who worked tirelessly to alleviate my severe pain.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atención médica muchísimas gracias a enfermeros y médicos tan dedicados que hasta que no calmaron mi dolor severo

reviews.review_text: I had a wonderful experience everyone was super attentive and I was treated great and everything went really fast.

I can’t believe what I just been through. I fell on my arm and been telling the doctor about my pain. The doctor would not prescribe me medicine and told me that if I was not OK with that that I could be discharged. Horrible worst experience of my life. I am walking feeling like fainting driving to a hospital.
Amazing caretakers!

I was at Baptist Urgent Care in Kendall last night with my 6-year-old daughter. I took her because she had symptoms of fever and vomiting. All the staff who attended to us were friendly and very kind, from the front desk to the nurses and doctor. They also performed X-rays and an ultrasound. And they were able to quickly determine what she had, which was a respiratory virus. They stabilized her and sent us home with medication. Everyone is professional and works with patience and calm. The clinic is very clean! For my daughter, despite feeling unwell, it was a very good stay. I would definitely recommend this urgent care center!
reviews.original_review_text: Estuve anoche en el Baptist de Kendall urgent care von mi niña de 6 años. La llevé porque estaba con síntomas de fiebre y vómito. Todo el personal que me atendió, fue amigable y muy amable. Desde el front desk, hasta los enfermeros y médico. También le realizaron placas de radiografía y ecografía. Y pudieron resolver rápido lo que ella tenía que era un virus respiratorio. La establecieron y nos enviaron a casa con medicina. Todos son profesionales y trabajan con paciencia y calma. La clínica es muy limpia! Para mí niña a pesar de su mal estar, fue una muy buena estadía. Sin dudar recomendaría este urgent care!!!

reviews.review_text: This has always been my place to go to when I have an emergency. The wait is never long and the treatment is always very special. They’re kind they’re polite and they take very good care of you all the doctors that I’ve seen. Their nurses have always been very special to me. There’s nothing that I asked for that. They don’t provide me heated blanket, cranberry juice information. I can honestly say this place is number one.
Excellent staff, Excellent communication with patient and family members.  Very positive experience .nurses and staff  all very professional.
Wonderful experience, service was great they treat me with respect and loving tender care
my experience at baptist health was really nice. marilyn was my nurse and she was so attentive at all times making sure i was comfortable and making me laugh so my time went by quickly.

Great experience , they took me in right away and everyone was very nice and informative. Helpful with all my questions most importantly they got me taken care of right away.

Diana the PA-C
Natalie my nurse
Steven and Nelson my techs
Thank you !
The best team, highly recommended! They are very kind and understanding, and they treat you with great patience and respect!
reviews.original_review_text: El mejor equipo , super recomendado son muy ambles y compresivos , te atienden con mucho paciencia y respecto !!!

reviews.original_review_text: Ayer en la noche tuve que ir y todos muy profesional  ,me atendieron enseguida y me sentí muy confortable ,la Dra  muy amable me explicó bien y el enfermo Bryan también, de verdad me sentí protegida .

reviews.review_text: Brought my daughter here twice with the flu. They were extremely thorough and professional. We had a great experience! Thank you!
Very good experience. The staff was very attentive, helpful, and friendly.

The physician assistant asked me twice about getting a rectum exam. My question was do I need one? Yes to see if there's blood. But I came in saying blood in my stool and I've given a stool sample with nothing but blood. I just thought that was strange.  Everything else was excellent.

The staff here were professional, attentive, and made a stressful situation much easier to navigate. A special shout-out to Marilyn and Damaris for providing truly exceptional care. They were extremely kind, and made sure we felt comfortable and informed throughout the visit. Their compassion and dedication did not go unnoticed. Thank you for everything!

Marilyn is the most amazing nurse in this urgent care. I have had the pleasure and have been so lucky to be her patient twice. Her main concern is patient care and most facilities have forgotten that patient care is the most vital part for any facility. Marilyn truly demonstrates all areas of patient care and patient satisfaction. Thank you Marilyn ❤️
Was great the people get my attention really quick. answer all my questions and take care me and my wife great.i give 6 stars if is possible 👍
I highly recommend Baptis Health Emergency. Excellent care from all the staff without exception. Prompt service and outstanding treatment. Thank you all.
reviews.original_review_text: Recomiendo este Baptis Health Emergency. Una excelente atención de todo su personal sin excepción. Una atención rápida y excelente trato. Gracias a todos.

reviews.review_text: Wonderful staff, beautiful (highly-maintained) location, and quick visit. Nurses and doctors were exceptionally cordial, helped me get through my time there with no issues and with no frowns.

reviews.review_text: Baptist staff at the ER provided medical attention with precision while making my time there full of compassion and care. Everyone contributed in making me feel safe and in good hands.

reviews.original_review_text: La experiencia fue excelente, el servicio que me dieron fue excelente, el trato de todo el personal fue excelente, poco tiempo de espera, la verdad salí muy complacida. Gracias y exhortarle que sigan así dando ese excelente servicio.

Was treated efficiently and with compassion. Everything seemed pretty fast even though it looked to be busy. They treated my pain and comfort immediately. I always choose this place because of their prompt and how efficient they are.

Kindly,
Ms. Ana Gomez

All the staff were very kind except for the young woman who took me for the CT scan. I was very out of it and too weak to coordinate because they had given me morphine for the pain. When the exam was over, she was there waiting for me with a wheelchair. I was trying to get up to sit in the wheelchair, and she was about 15 meters away. She could see I was struggling to get off the examination table, but she was unable to help me. She just stood there and watched me. She was unfriendly, to say the least. I tried to see her name on her uniform, but I couldn't. I was diagnosed with diverticulitis yesterday, Tuesday, February 17, 2026.
reviews.original_review_text: Todo el personal fue muy amable menos la muchacha que me llevo hacer el CT Scam, yo estaba muy ida y sin fuerzas para coordinar porque me habían puesto morfina para el dolor y cuando terminó el examen ella estaba alli esperandome con una silla de ruedas, yo tratando de levantarme para sentarme en la silla de ruedas y ella estaba como a 15 metros de distancia y veia que yo estaba haciendo un esfuerzo para pararme de la Camilla y fue incapaz de ayudarme, se quedo parada y solo me observaba, fue poco amable, por no decir NADA AMABLE, traté de ver su nombre en el uniforme, pero no pude. Me diagnosticaron Diverticulitis y eso fue ayer Martes 2/17/2026

I was attended by Sebastian, nurse Stephanie, nurse Indira, Mike the xray tech and Dr. Taylor. The hospital was super clean. I even got to visit the restroom, which was also extremely clean.  I live all the way by Coconut Grove and I would definitely go back to this standalone Baptist ER just because the visit was extra extraordinary. Oh, and I suggest you try The hazelnut cappuccino k cup.

I came into the ER with a dislocated shoulder and was in a lot of pain. Dr. Yarde treated me and was amazing. She was professional, reassuring, and incredibly efficient. reviews.owner_answer: Hello Ivonne - Thank you for the five-star review of your emergency care visit. We truly appreciate your kind feedback about our staff. Many thanks for choosing Baptist Health for your healthcare needs.

reviews.review_text: My experience as usual at my arrival the receptionist, the doctor the nurse that emergency care is top of the line no complain. They are the best they all make me feel VIP very important person.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello Stephen - We greatly appreciate the five-star review and thoughtful feedback about your visit. We strive to provide outstanding care and service because your well-being is important to us. Thank you for choosing Baptist Health for your healthcare needs.

reviews.review_text: I am truly very satisfied with the treatment I received at the facility. I went in because of pain in the early morning, and it turned out I needed surgery as soon as possible because my gallbladder was inflamed. I'm at home recovering, and I can't stop thinking about all the help they gave me, especially the Cuban nurse and the young woman who does the ultrasounds, who is also Cuban. Dr. Adam Elijah and everyone else were exceptional. I won't hesitate to return if I have any health problems. It's the best place I could have gone. They ran a series of tests super quickly, without any delay, and they tried to relieve my terrible pain in the shortest time possible. Thank you so much! 🙏
reviews.original_review_text: La verdad estoy muy satisfecha con el trato q he recibido en la instalación fui por un dolor en la madrugada y resultó ser q tenía q operarme cuanto antes porq tenía la vesícula inflamada estoy en casa recuperándome y no dejo d pensar en toda  la ayuda que me brindaron en especial a la enfermera cubana y la muchacha que hace los ultrasonidos también cubanas .El doctor Adam elijah todos fueron excepcionales no dudaré en volver cuando tenga cualquier problema  d salud es el mejor lugar al q pude haber ido me hicieron una serie d pruebas super rápido sin ninguna demora y procuraron aliviar mi terrible dolor en el menos tiempo posible miles d gracias 🙏

reviews.review_text: This Emergency Department is excellent. The people at the front desk are friendly and helpful. The registration process is quick. The nurses are excellent. The doctor who saw me was wonderful; she listens, explains things, and takes her time. What a good and attentive doctor! The Radiology department also provided excellent service. The cleanliness and organization are impeccable, from the moment you walk in to the restrooms—everything is spotless. I give it 5 stars; it's efficient in every way. Thank you! 🙏🥰♥️

Every time I’ve gone to this Baptist ER, I’ve felt cared for from the moment I arrived. The nurses and doctors are kind, professional, and take the time to listen. When you’re in the ER, you’re not feeling well and you need compassion — and that’s exactly how they treat you. This level of care is rare in Miami.

I felt right at home. The staff at Urgent Care provided excellent care and performed all the necessary tests for my condition. Thank you so much for such great service.
reviews.original_review_text: Me sentí como en casa, muy buenos cuidados por todo el personal de Urgent Care, me hicieron los exámenes requeridos para mi molestia, mil gracias por tan buenos servicios, gracias

reviews.review_text: Beautiful facility, caring, efficient staff. I would highly recommend to friends and family.

Excellent attention from the beginning to the end. From the registration to the doctors, nice, respectful, clean. We went early today with my 11yo daughter throwing up since 2am and everything was fast, gentle and smooth.
Service was great.
Excellent service, the staff was very professional and friendly. Thank you, thank you!
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atencion el personal muy profesional y amable Gracias,Gracias

reviews.review_text: Excellent service, excellent attention, everyone was very professional and friendly
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente servicio excelente atención todos muy profesionales amables

reviews.review_text: Everything was excellent during my visit yesterday to Baptist Hospital, especially the nurse who attended to me, named Carlos. He is a very efficient person at his job and also extremely kind...
reviews.original_review_text: Todo ha sido excelente en mi visita de ayer al Baptist Hospital,principalmente el enfermero que me atendió llamado Carlos es una persona muy eficiente en su trabajo y además extremadamente amable...

reviews.review_text: Professional and caring environment

Tonight I went to this Baptist Hospital Health Center for a stomach problem and had the best experience.
From the front desk staff to the nurses and the doctor, everyone was wonderful, although I want to especially mention the nurse who attended to me, a very polite and efficient young man named Carlos.

In short, this demonstrates the excellence of this hospital.
reviews.original_review_text:
Hoy en la noche fuí a este Centro de Salud de Baptist Hospital por un problema estomacal y tuve la mejor experiencia.
Desde el Front Desk,los enfermeros y la Doctora,todos fueron maravillosos,aunque quiero hacer énfasis en el enfermero que me atendió,un muchacho muy educado y eficiente llamado Carlos.
En fin,aquí queda demostrada la excelencia de este Hospital.

reviews.review_text: The staff is extremely attentive and professional. Their focus is to understand your needs and help resolve your medical issues

I was seen fairly quickly and the Doctor was great but there was an issue with the nurse assigned to my room. He gave me an injection and it hurt so badly and he apologized for doing it incorrectly but it seemed as if he didn’t know what he was doing or was new to nursing. It was not a pleasant experience and I left there with a huge headache
Excellent service! The staff was very professional and attentive! I highly recommend them. The nurses were super attentive and Dr. Jose F Llach was the best! 👍🏻
reviews.original_review_text: Muy buena atencion!!!!! El personal muy professional y atento!!!! Lo recomiendo con toda confianza the nurses Super atentas and Dr Jose F Llach was the Best!!!!👍🏻

reviews.review_text:
All of the staff were excellent from sign in/security,
Doctor, nurse, and the imaging technician. I said I was cold and I was going to sit in the sunlight to try to get warm and the next thing I heard was here’s a warm blanket for you from.the security tech. The doctor list and explain what was going to be done. The same with the nurse and of imagining tech. The sign out was a little bit hard to read because the font was so bad smasd. Overall the service was beyond my expectation with the care I received.

I appreciate your attention. The receptionist was very professional and friendly, and the team of doctors and nurses were very attentive and knowledgeable in their work. I wish you much success and hope you continue providing excellent care with this wonderful service.
reviews.original_review_text:
Agradezco su atención prestada el Recepcionista muy profesional y agradable el equipo de médicos y enfermeros
muy atentos y con dominio de la actividad que realizan le deseo muchos éxitos y continúen  Prestando atención con esa bella labor

reviews.review_text: Excellent service, everything was very fast, and the staff was very friendly.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atencion y muy rapido  todo y el personal muy amable

reviews.review_text: As I arrived I was in a lot of pain. It looked pretty crowded but I got in to see the intake nurse within 20 min. Everyone was very friendly and did a great job of what order things would go. The doctor on call-Ashley Geraldo was very good and kind. It was the best Urgent Care I have ever been too.

Incredibly beautiful and clean facility.
Front desk staff attended to me right away, and I was called in within five minutes.
All the staff were very professional and attentive.
ER doctor, Dr. Yarde was extremely thorough ordering all sorts of tests and labs.
She discussed the results in detail prior to me leaving.
Highly recommend this facility.
Excellent work by the staff. Ricardo was the nurse who attended to my mother; he was very professional, kind, and provided exceptional care.

I took my two year old to be seen for a toe fracture, triage nurse was nice and the doctor was knowledgeable. Time spent was reasonable. The only complaint is that our assigned nurse, Melissa, not once assessed my daughter. She never came in to the room introduce herself. Another nurse came in, during the visit, did not introduce himself, turned on a video for registration and walked out. My daughter was screaming and crying in pain, at no time was an ice pack or pain killer offered by anyone. The nurse, Melissa came in only when we called requesting discharge papers since the pineapp already had posted xray results and discharge instructions. She claimed she was on break, but we had seen her at nursing station the entire visit. I will be reviewing to ensure there is no nursing assement documented by her, that would be falsification of a legal document. My husband works at South Miami Hospital ED and we have also been patients at West Kendall Baptist Hospital and have had great experiences at those two facilities. Perhaps this nurse should be retrained in basic nursing care.

I recently visited the Emergency Room at Baptist Hospital due to severe neck pain, and I couldn’t be more impressed with the care I received. From the moment I walked in, the staff was professional, compassionate, and attentive. The check-in process was smooth and efficient, and I was seen promptly.
The medical team took the time to listen to my concerns, explain the possible causes, and walk me through the treatment plan. They made sure I was comfortable throughout the entire visit and provided clear instructions for follow-up care. The facility was clean and well-organized, which added to the overall sense of trust and safety.
I truly appreciate the dedication and kindness of everyone I encountered. Baptist Hospital ER exceeded my expectations, and I highly recommend them to anyone in need of emergency care
Very professional and nice people
Wonderful experience, excellent service from all staff, cleanliness, comfort
reviews.original_review_text: Maravillosa experiencia, muy buen trato por todo el personal, limpieza, confort

reviews.review_text: Quick, clean, professional.....
